prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第198名→2026年第157 名，办学实力和声誉稳步提升；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第79位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未 出现异常关注信号；第五轮学科评估中延边大学未出现A-及以上等级学科记录，优势学科不突出，对报考热度的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类 招生专业中含计算机科学与技术（社会热度推荐）、人工智能（社会热度谨慎观望）、电子信息工程/通信工程（社会热度高热推荐）、临床医学（社会热度推荐）等热门方向， 对考生吸引力较强。重庆物理类考生数2025年约139478人，2026年估算约135495人，略有减少；延边大学位于吉林省延边 朝鲜族自治州，属东北地区，距重庆较远；该校在重庆物理类招生规模约30–35人，跨省报考的地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28271名、2026年计 划扩招6.7%使竞争缓和（位次后移）、物理类考生数略有减少、学校排名持续上升、招生专业中含多个热门方向等因素；预测2026年 物理类最低位次约29452名，区间28952–29952名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 25996, 27557, 33296, 26935, and 28271 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 25996–33296. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (33296), followed by stabilization in the 26935–28271 range in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 28271. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 35 in 2021, 31 in 2022, and 30 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 32, an expansion of about 6.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition due to increased slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in academic strength and reputation. In recent years, the university's reputation has been stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps recorded; its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal attention signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, so its advantageous disciplines are not prominent, limiting their impact on boosting application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment includes popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology (socially hot, recommended), Artificial Intelligence (socially hot, cautiously observed), Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering (socially hot, highly recommended), and Clinical Medicine (socially hot, recommended), which strongly attract candidates. The number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing was approximately 139,478 in 2025 and is estimated to be about 135,495 in 2026, a slight decrease; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, in Northeast China, far from Chongqing; its enrollment scale in Chongqing for Physics Category is about 30–35, and the influence of cross-province application geographic preferences is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28271, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 6.7% easing competition (ranking shift backward), a slight decrease in Physics Category examinees, the university's rising ranking, and multiple popular majors in enrollment, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 29452, with a range of 28952–29952.
